title: Solitaire
seoDescription: Free online Solitaire (Klondike) card game. Play the classic patience card game with no download. Draw 3 cards, drag or click to move, auto-complete foundations. Perfect for casual gaming and brain training.
step1Desc: Cards are dealt into 7 tableau columns. Top cards are face up. The goal is to build 4 foundation piles by suit from Ace to King.
step2Desc: Click a card to select it, then click where to move. Build descending sequences with alternating colors (red/black) on the tableau.
step3Desc: Click the stock pile to draw 3 cards. Move Aces to foundations as soon as possible. Move all cards to foundations to win!
faq1Q: What are the rules of Solitaire?
faq1A: Build 4 foundation piles from Ace to King by suit. On the tableau, build descending sequences with alternating red/black colors. Draw from the stock when stuck.
faq2A: Click a card to select it (it highlights), then click the destination. You can also double-click a card to auto-move it to foundations.
faq3A: This classic version plays forward — plan your moves carefully! Use the stock pile to find needed cards.
